# Aflibercept 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Aflibercept 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Aflibercept</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Aflibercept 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer (MCRC).</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>esotropia（99.4%）</li>
<li>esophageal varices with bleeding（97.6%）</li>
<li>esophageal varices without bleeding（97.6%）</li>
<li>varicose disease（97.0%）</li>
<li>urethral calculus（96.0%）</li>
<li>adenosine deaminase deficiency（95.8%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（95.6%）</li>
<li>ectomesenchymoma（94.5%）</li>
<li>malignant cutaneous granular cell skin tumor（94.5%）</li>
<li>middle ear neuroendocrine tumor（94.4%）</li>
<li>reticular dysgenesis（94.3%）</li>
<li>severe combined immunodeficiency due to LCK deficiency（94.2%）</li>
<li>human herpesvirus 8-related tumor（94.1%）</li>
<li>lung fibrosis-immunodeficiency-46,XX gonadal dysgenesis syndrome（93.7%）</li>
<li>non-severe combined immunodeficiency（93.2%）</li>
<li>T-B+ severe combined immunodeficiency due to CD45 deficiency（93.1%）</li>
<li>anemia of prematurity（93.0%）</li>
<li>T-B+ severe combined immunodeficiency due to gamma chain deficiency（93.0%）</li>
<li>Immunoerythromyeloid hypoplasia（93.0%）</li>
<li>lipoma of the conjunctiva（92.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/aflibercept/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
